title: Portfolio Management Techniques: What is the role of the Treynor-Black model in active...
summary: Describe the Treynor-Black model's approach of combining active picks with a passive index.
prompt: What is the role of the Treynor-Black model in active portfolio management?

options.text: The Treynor-Black model plays a crucial role in active portfolio management by
Equal to the weighted average return
Calculated using weights and standard deviations

solution: The Treynor-Black model plays a crucial role in active portfolio management by providing a systematic method for constructing a portfolio using a limited number of securities that have been analyzed by an investor. It combines the alpha of selected securities with a market index to create an optimal risky portfolio. This allows an investor to benefit from their security analysis while still maintaining a diversified approach.
